name: dominos-agent
description: Autonomous Domino's Taiwan ordering agent with StraitsX virtual card payment via MCP

scripts.test:pickup: node order.mjs '2人份、想吃雞肉口味、預算800元、外帶'
scripts.test:delivery: node order.mjs '4人份、其中一個要有海鮮口味、金額要介於NT1000到NT1500、必須買可樂跟隨便一個副餐、明天中午12點外送到預先指定的地址'
scripts.test:vegetarian: node order.mjs '3人份、素食、預算1200元、要飲料'
